allow: Bash(curl -sL --max-time 30 -H "User-Agent: Mozilla/5.0 \(Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64\) AppleWebKit/537.36" "https://courtsidetennis.com/products.json?limit=10")

Bash(python -c "import sys, json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(f'{p[\\"id\\"]}: {p[\\"title\\"]} | {p[\\"product_type\\"]} | variants: {len\(p[\\"variants\\"]\)} | prices: {[v[\\"price\\"] for v in p[\\"variants\\"]]} | tags: {p[\\"tags\\"]}'\) for p in data['products']]")

Bash(python -c "import sys, re; html = sys.stdin.read\(\); html = re.sub\(r'<script[^>]*>.*?</script>', '', html, flags=re.DOTALL\); html = re.sub\(r'<style[^>]*>.*?</style>', '', html, flags=re.DOTALL\); text = re.sub\(r'<[^>]*>', ' ', html\); text = re.sub\(r'\\s+', ' ', text\).strip\(\); print\(text[:5000]\)")

Bash(python -c "import sys, re; html = sys.stdin.read\(\); html = re.sub\(r'<script[^>]*>.*?</script>', '', html, flags=re.DOTALL\); html = re.sub\(r'<style[^>]*>.*?</style>', '', html, flags=re.DOTALL\); text = re.sub\(r'<[^>]*>', ' ', html\); text = re.sub\(r'\\s+', ' ', text\).strip\(\); pages = re.findall\(r'Pages\\s*\\\([^\)]+\\\).*?Save.*?\(?=Shop|HELPFUL\)', text\); if pages: print\(pages[0][:1000]\); else: print\(text[:2000]\)")

Bash(python -c "import sys, re; html = sys.stdin.read\(\); html = re.sub\(r'<script[^>]*>.*?</script>', '', html, flags=re.DOTALL\); html = re.sub\(r'<style[^>]*>.*?</style>', '', html, flags=re.DOTALL\); text = re.sub\(r'<[^>]*>', ' ', html\); text = re.sub\(r'\\s+', ' ', text\).strip\(\); pages = re.findall\(r'Pages.*?Newsletter.*?\(?=Shop|HELPFUL\)', text\); print\(pages[0] if pages else text[:1500]\)")
